content_of_post_to_comment:
I’m feeling dreadful about how scrolling through reels is keeping me from doing anything I love. I’m diagnosed with adhd which…
Everyone on the internet has apparently these last years .. however I haven’t been using my meds for sometime now as I had the impression of starting a dependence on them.
But now scrolling reels is what I have been doing this summer…
I used to uninstall the app during exam weeks but Instagram messages are unfortunately my main way of keeping in touch with friends including my boyfriend so it would be really unrealistic of me to just uninstall Instagram indefinitely. Any tips on how to break this cycle without an aggressive cut off ?
Also I seem to just ignore the time limits I have set for myself both from both Apple ‘s time settings and from Instagram which sucks obviously.
So basically do you guys have any suggestions on what to do ?
Thank you!
comment: Scrolling reels with ADHD + off meds is a rough combo because the app basically turns into a slot machine. If IG messages are non-negotiable, I’d separate them hard: delete the app but keep login via browser for messages only, and move all chats from the main feed. The feed is doing most of the damage, not the messages themselves. Maybe also have someone else set the Screen Time passcode?
